title: cyclosorus membraniferus
intro: Cyclosorus membraniferus, also known as the membranous cyclosorus, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus membraniferus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
